entity.name: Craig Abplanalp
entity.description: Reference-level home theater and immersive audio specialist. 40+ years experience. Former President of Definitive Audio. THX, Trinnov, and CEDIA certified. Current Custom Sales Manager at Definitive Audio, Bellevue WA.

capabilities.description: High-performance two-channel and multi-channel music listening room design

capabilities.description: Integrated lighting and lighting control for residential AV environments
